title: Team member closeout: Shaded with Sylvan curation slice
body: Team member closeout - Boundary owned: Shaded read-only coordination, gate-runner, and review support for Sylvan correction slice. Outcome: owner correction enforced in team route; archive-first route withdrawn; Sylvan patched process-before-archive invariant and closed claims. Evidence: team-start 97369dec, coordination replies 7e3aa573 and 2f12051e, gate report 65dc3aaa, review finding 773938c6, claim check c7b5b288, heartbeat-end 1bbb34bc. Claims/queue/git state: no Shaded claims retained; no Shaded source edits after owner correction; no commit queue action. Validation: markdownlint on touched docs passed; git diff --check passed; practice fitness informational remains CRITICAL (1 critical, 5 hard, 13 soft) with pending-graduations the sole critical surface. Handoff needed: next pending-graduations work must be processed-content-first; no archive of unprocessed source.
